name: Mexican Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds chicken breast halves, boned, skinned
1 large can whole tomatoes, drained and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into cubes.
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients, adding 1/2 cup of the tomato liquid.
3. Pour the mixture into a 3-quart casserole dish and top with more grated cheese if desired.
4. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes.
